text:
In this story:

ThereГўВҖВҷs a pipeline from Norman to Paris.ГӮ

Seven current or former Oklahoma athletes are competing at the 2024 Paris Olympic Games, which kicked off Friday with Opening Ceremonies. The games will conclude with Closing Ceremonies on Aug. 11.ГӮ

Sooners competing in Paris includeAbraham Ancer(menГўВҖВҷs golf),Emre Dodanli(menГўВҖВҷs gymnastics),James Fraschilla(3x3 menГўВҖВҷs basketball),Ralford Mullings(menГўВҖВҷs track & field),Abi Olajuwon(womenГўВҖВҷs basketball),Ama Pipi(womenГўВҖВҷs track & field) andVernon Turner(menГўВҖВҷs track & field). With the addition of seven new athletes, OU has now produced 89 Olympians. A former or current Sooner has competed in the last 22 Olympic Games.ГӮ

HereГўВҖВҷs a closer look at each Sooner competing in Paris.ГӮ

At 33, this is AncerГўВҖВҷs second time representing Mexico at the Olympics. He also competed at the Tokyo Olympics in 2021. Although born in McAllen, TX, Ancer spent time in Reynosa, Mexico while growing up and has dual citizenship.ГӮ

After a one-year stint at Odessa College, Ancer transferred to OU, where he graduated in 2013. Ancer left Norman second all-time in scoring average in program history. He then started his professional career immediately and now competes on the LIV Golf Tour.ГӮ

The menГўВҖВҷs golf competition will start at 2 a.m. Thursday and wraps up with Round 4 on Sunday.ГӮ

Dodanli became an Olympian before even concluding his collegiate career with OU. Just finishing his junior season, Dodanli will compete in menГўВҖВҷs gymnastics for Turkey. This is the first time in its countryГўВҖВҷs history that Turkey qualified a team in menГўВҖВҷs gymnastics. Dodanli won gold in the all-around at the Turkish Artistic Gymnastics Championship earlier this summer.ГӮ

Dodanli was the first Sooner to compete in Paris, with menГўВҖВҷs gymnastics qualification on Saturday. The individual all-around final will be Wednesday. Event finals start Saturday.ГӮ

Fraschilla will represent OU in a different way as an assistant coach on the USA MenГўВҖВҷs 3x3 Basketball National Team. He walked onto the SoonersГўВҖВҷ basketball team before graduating in 2015 and following in his fatherГўВҖВҷs footsteps as a coach.ГӮ

This is only the second Olympics with 3x3 basketball, however, the U.S. did not qualify for the Tokyo Olympics. USAГўВҖВҷs first menГўВҖВҷs 3x3 game in an Olympics will be against Serbia at 3:35 p.m. Tuesday.ГӮ

Mullings will compete in the discus throw for Jamaica. HeГўВҖВҷs originally from Kingston, Jamaica. Although a junior at OU, Mullings actually hasnГўВҖВҷt even competed for the Sooners yet after transferring from Arkansas and starting his career at Arizona State. He competed unattached this past season.ГӮ

The discus throw competition will start on Aug. 5 with qualification.ГӮ

Born in Houston but of Nigerian descent, the daughter of NBA legendHakeem "The Dream" Olajuwonis an assistant coach for NigeriaГўВҖВҷs womenГўВҖВҷs basketball team. She was a McDonaldГўВҖВҷs All-American before getting to OU in 2006. She averaged 10.6 points a game as a senior in 2009-10 before a brief WNBA career. She then got into coaching, currently serving as an assistant for the Connecticut Sun.ГӮ

Nigeria plays France at 10:15 a.m. Thursday after beating Australia 75-62 early Monday morning.ГӮ

Born in London, Pipi will compete in a pair of events for Great Britain, including the 400 meter and 4x400 relay, in her second Olympics at 28. Her team finished fifth in the 4x400 relay in Tokyo.ГӮ

Pipi attended OU in 2015-18, becoming an All-American in 2018 and winning a Big 12 title in the 200 meter. She also holds the school record in the indoor 400-meter sprint.ГӮ

Pipi will start with the 400 meter on Aug. 5.ГӮ

Having just finished his OU career in 2023, Turner will represent the United States in high jump. He still holds the program record in the outdoor and indoor high jump. He was also an indoor NCAA champion in 2022. Turner is the only Oklahoman on this list, having attended Yukon High School. However, he was born in Kansas City, MO, so the state of Missouri gets to claim Turner as an Olympian.ГӮ

The high jump competition will start with qualification on Aug. 7.

title: A Look at Oklahoma Athletes Competing in Paris Olympics
description: Seven current or former Oklahoma athletes are competing at the 2024 Paris Olympic Games until Aug. 11.
